description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image and defining two stages: test and doc. Add a tests job in the test stage that runs the before_script commands rustc --version, cargo --version, rustup component add rustfmt-preview, rustup component add clippy-preview, then executes cargo b, cargo fmt -- --check, cargo clippy, and cargo t; it caches $CARGO_HOME/ and target/ with the key tests, sets the variables CARGO_HOME to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo and RUST_BACKTRACE to '1', and runs on all branches. Add a pages job in the doc stage that runs cargo doc, removes the public directory, moves target/doc to public, caches $CARGO_HOME/ with the key pages, stores the public/ directory as a pages artifact, restricts execution to the master branch, and deploys to GitLab Pages. Ensure the pipeline respects the defined stages and variables.
